title: Batman Arkham City
notes:
WINEPREFIX="/mnt/sdb1/Games/steamapps/compatdata/200260/pfx" WINEARCH=win64 wine winecfg

and change from windows 7 to winxp﻿

before rename the setup Folder in Main Folder to SetupDisabled for .net bug

title: Batman: Arkham City GOTY
notes:
Performance: Runs ok. Not so smooth as running on Windows directly, but it's playable

Workaround: Game wasn't opening. Crashed with this message:

System.InvalidTimeZoneException: Exception of type 'System.InvalidTimeZoneException' was thrown.
at System.TimeZoneInfo.FromRegistryKey (System.String id, Microsoft.Win32.RegistryKey key) [0x00014] in <773ec02b42f74a918ccd74911c8063c9>:0

Searching on web, discovered that removing /etc/localtime symlink (which in my case points to ../usr/share/zoneinfo/America/Sao_Paulo) solves the issue and the game opens

title: Stonehearth
notes: Game opens but gets stuck during initial logo. Music runs in the background
Game opens but gets stuck during initial logo. Music runs in the background

notes: Runs perfect nothing needed to be done.

notes: Game crashes when creating a new game. With PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 instead of crashing, the game gets stuck with a full loading bar.
title: Stonehearth

notes: Runs, but frequently freezes and stops responding to input.
title: Stonehearth

notes: Game seems to be fine. Some button issues where pressing buttons do not work. Some issue with all buttons but camera movement buttons disabling, preventing shutting the game down too through the menus.
